name: elevenlabs-bar-visualizer
title: Audio Bar Visualizer
author: ElevenLabs UI
description: Visualizes live or simulated multi-band audio levels across voice interaction states.

changes: Changed project aliases to bundled source-local imports and normalized formatting.
Added native reduced-motion detection so demo and state-sequencing animation stop when requested.
Removed the unrelated site URL helper, kept the upstream cn utility, normalized formatting, and made the closure source-local.

modifications.change: Changed project aliases to bundled source-local imports and normalized formatting. Added native reduced-motion detection so demo and state-sequencing animation stop when requested.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component install-complete, source-local, accessible, and production-safe without changing its core upstream design.
